responseByAreaType.note: Category 2 ambulance mean response time by area classification. Category 2 = emergency, 18-minute mean target.

cat1RuralTargetAchievement.note: Category 1 calls responded to within 7 minutes in rural areas. National target is 90%.

trustPerformance.note: Mean Cat 2 response time for rural incidents by ambulance trust, 2024

metadata.methodology: Response times derived from NHS England AQI data, split by rural-urban classification using ONS rural-urban classification of the incident postcode. Category 2 mean target is 18 minutes. Category 1 target is 90% within 7 minutes. Trust-level rural figures are NHS England AQI trust-level data filtered to rural-classified postcodes.
knownIssues: Rural-urban classification uses 2011 ONS methodology; 2021 reclassification may shift some figures
2020 figures affected by COVID-19 pandemic demand patterns
Some trusts cover mixed urban-rural geographies — LAS rural figure covers outer London areas only
